item.name: Severum
item.description:
The dark, vertical banding present on this small freshwater fish make it easily identifiable.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The black, uniform vertical stripes of this wavekin appear as if daubed on with an ink-laden brush. Each time a specimen with a different number of markings is caught, the debate over whether such variations warrant separate classification is rekindled.
